title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, generate, pull, push, list, copy, delete, show, create.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, LLM, and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed open-webui); supports RAG, multimodal, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama API with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into an inline coding copilot.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with async/await and streaming support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Flask-based web UI to chat with any local Ollama model from a browser.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks for Ollama with Open-WebUI, qdrant, etc.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into a server via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-Mode to chat with Ollama models in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a side-panel chat powered by any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing TypeScript/JavaScript bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package for Python developers to integrate Ollama models into apps.
